parameters.description: The ID of the user whose status is being queried

post.summary: Check and broadcast status if needed

parameters.name: roomKey
parameters.description: The key of the room to check the status for

requestBody.description: User ID and optional idempotency key (same key + settled round → no-op)

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated key for this deck-round check

200.description: Status checked and broadcasted successfully if needed
